sanguine.name: Sanguine
sanguine.description: The blood of the passionate and pleasure-seeking. Those in the throes of desire, excitement, or hedonistic joy. Found among lovers, partygoers, thrill-seekers, and the newly infatuated.

choleric.name: Choleric
choleric.description: The blood of the furious and driven. Those consumed by anger, ambition, or competitive fire. Found among fighters, athletes, road-ragers, domestic abusers, and anyone in the grip of rage.

melancholic.name: Melancholic
melancholic.description: The blood of the sorrowful and thoughtful. Those deep in grief, depression, intellectual absorption, or artistic melancholy. Found among mourners, scholars, artists in crisis, and the clinically depressed.

phlegmatic.name: Phlegmatic
phlegmatic.description: The blood of the detached and controlled. Those who are serene, indifferent, or emotionally suppressed. Found among meditators, bureaucrats, the heavily medicated, and those in shock.

animal.name: Animal
animal.description: Animal blood. Provides limited nourishment. Cannot reduce Hunger below 1. At Blood Potency 2+, slakes 1 less Hunger. At Blood Potency 4+, provides no nourishment at all.

empty.name: Empty / Thin
empty.description: Blood with no discernible resonance. The vessel was emotionally numb, heavily drugged, or otherwise flat. Provides nourishment but no resonance bonus.

fleeting.name: Fleeting
fleeting.description: A temporary emotional state. Grants a single bonus die to one roll using an associated Discipline this session.

intense.name: Intense
intense.description: A deep, sustained emotional state. Grants a bonus die to all rolls using associated Disciplines for the session. Required for learning in-clan Disciplines at reduced XP cost.

acute.name: Acute (Dyscrasia)
acute.description: An extreme, overwhelming emotional state — rare and valuable. Grants 2 bonus dice to associated Discipline rolls. The blood itself is intoxicating and may trigger a Hunger Frenzy check to stop feeding.
